title: Breathe. Believe. Release. Receive.
excerpt: Good news! I wanted to let all of you know that we heard your feedback about my monthly tee subscription, Fresh Squeezed Fashion , and have lowered the price! Getting a new tee each month should be fun AND affordable.…
body: Good news! I wanted to let all of you know that we heard your feedback about my monthly tee subscription, Fresh Squeezed Fashion, and have lowered the price! Getting a new tee each month should be fun AND affordable. Thanks to your feedback, we were able to meet with our team and adjust the pricing without changing anything about the shirts’ quality, so more of you can join the par-tee. I can’t wait to see you all in these awesome tees! Last chance to get one of these designs!
